hero.title: Understand the Crypto Market Before Everyone Else

summary.title: What does the market actually mean right now?
summary.text: The crypto market is trading above the previous cycle high. Bitcoin dominance remains elevated, which suggests altcoins may not have fully entered expansion yet.

cycles.title: Compare Crypto Market Cycles
cycles.text: See how the current market compares with previous cycle peaks.

items.insight: The 2017 cycle was driven by ICO speculation and early retail adoption.
The 2021 cycle introduced stronger institutions, DeFi, NFTs and larger market liquidity.
The 2024 cycle was shaped by ETF flows, Bitcoin halving expectations and renewed liquidity.
The current market appears stronger than past cycle highs, but dominance and risk still matter.

items.a: Crypto market cap is the total estimated value of cryptocurrencies in the market.
No. Market cap gives context, but it cannot guarantee future price movement.
Bitcoin dominance shows Bitcoin’s share of the total crypto market value.
Crypto cycles usually move through accumulation, expansion, euphoria and correction.
No. Kryptonal is educational and should not be treated as financial advice.

marketCap.title: Crypto Market Cap Analysis
marketCap.description: Analyze total cryptocurrency market capitalization, compare current market value with previous crypto cycles, and understand Bitcoin dominance, market phases, and long-term crypto trends.
marketCap.chartNote: Example market cap chart. Live crypto API data will be connected later.
marketCap.chartTitle: Track When Altcoins Start Taking Market Strength
marketCap.chartDescription: The Altcoin Season Index helps you understand whether capital is flowing into Bitcoin or rotating into altcoins. Monitor market leadership, momentum shifts, and risk appetite across the crypto market.
marketCap.analysisText: The crypto market cap is approaching previous cycle highs, which may indicate an expansion phase. Bitcoin dominance remains elevated, suggesting capital is still concentrated in major assets before a broader altcoin rotation. Risk remains moderate because crypto markets are volatile and highly sensitive to macroeconomic conditions.

content.whatText: Crypto market cap is the total value of cryptocurrency assets in circulation.
content.whyText: Market cap helps investors and researchers understand market size, capital inflows, valuation trends, and whether the crypto market is expanding or cooling down.
content.cyclesText: Crypto market cycles usually move through accumulation, expansion, distribution, and contraction.

historical.description: Select a year to compare its crypto market-cap peak, Bitcoin yearly peak, and how far today’s market is from that period.
historical.vsNow: Current market cap vs that year
historical.greenRed: Green means today is higher. Red means today is lower.

faqs.question: What is total crypto market cap?
faqs.answer: Total crypto market cap is the combined value of all cryptocurrencies.

faqs.question: Can market cap predict crypto prices?
faqs.answer: Market cap cannot predict prices with certainty.

faqs.question: How does Bitcoin dominance affect the crypto market?
faqs.answer: Bitcoin dominance shows Bitcoin’s share of the total crypto market.

faqs.question: What is crypto market analysis?
faqs.answer: Crypto market analysis evaluates the overall market using metrics like market cap, Bitcoin dominance, and trend indicators.

faqs.question: Can crypto market cap predict price?
faqs.answer: No, market cap does not predict prices directly.

faqs.question: Is this financial advice?
faqs.answer: No. This platform provides educational insights only.

leverageRisk.title: Crypto Leverage Risk Tracker
leverageRisk.description: Track whether futures traders are becoming too crowded, overheated, or balanced using live funding rates and open interest.
leverageRisk.avgFundingHint: Positive funding means longs are paying shorts. Very high funding can signal crowded bullish positioning.
leverageRisk.openInterestHint: Higher open interest means more leveraged positions are active in the market.
leverageRisk.disclaimer: Leverage risk is an educational signal, not financial advice.

bias.longCrowded: Long traders are becoming crowded. Upside momentum may exist, but liquidation risk is higher.
bias.shortCrowded: Short traders are becoming crowded. A short squeeze can happen if price moves against them.
bias.balanced: Positioning looks balanced. Leverage risk is not extreme right now.

smartMoney.title: Smart Money Alert Board
smartMoney.description: Track chains where liquidity, TVL, and weekly growth suggest stronger capital activity.
smartMoney.disclaimer: Smart-money alerts are educational signals only. They do not guarantee price movement and are not financial advice.

stablecoins.title: Stablecoin Liquidity Tracker
stablecoins.description: Track where stablecoin liquidity is concentrated across crypto ecosystems.
stablecoins.newbieText: Stablecoins are like digital dollars in crypto.
stablecoins.increaseText: It can mean users sold volatile assets into stablecoins, or new cash entered the ecosystem.
stablecoins.decreaseText: It can mean users are buying crypto assets, moving funds to another chain, or withdrawing liquidity.
stablecoins.chainExplanation: Higher stablecoin concentration can indicate stronger liquidity conditions and more active capital flow.

meaning.high: Stablecoin liquidity is very large across the tracked chains.
meaning.medium: Stablecoin liquidity is healthy across the tracked chains.
meaning.low: Stablecoin liquidity is relatively low across the tracked chains.

narratives.ethereum: Ethereum usually holds deep DeFi and institutional liquidity.
narratives.tron: Tron is heavily used for USDT transfers because fees are low and transfers are fast.
narratives.solana: Solana liquidity can reflect retail activity, meme trading, and fast-moving speculative demand.
narratives.base: Base liquidity can show growing Layer 2 ecosystem activity and Coinbase-linked adoption.
narratives.arbitrum: Arbitrum liquidity is often linked to DeFi activity and Ethereum scaling demand.
narratives.bsc: BSC liquidity often reflects retail trading and lower-fee activity.
narratives.default: This chain shows stablecoin activity inside its ecosystem.

stablecoins.disclaimer: Stablecoin data does not guarantee market direction.

chainStrength.title: Chain Strength Tracker
chainStrength.description: Compare blockchain ecosystems by TVL, growth, protocol count, and momentum.
chainStrength.disclaimer: Chain strength does not guarantee token price performance.

sectorRotation.title: Sector Rotation Heatmap
sectorRotation.description: Track which crypto sectors are gaining or losing momentum.
sectorRotation.disclaimer: Sector rotation is not a direct buy or sell signal.
